generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder measuring motor shaft position, velocity, and acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData, MotorVelocityData, MotorAccelerationData
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder measuring motor shaft position, velocity, and acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData, MotorVelocityData, MotorAccelerationData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentData
]

instance MotorTorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque sensor measuring torque from motor and gearwheel"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueData
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Position data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Velocity data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Acceleration data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Input current data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Torque data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorTorqueSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorPositionDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time position data from motor and secondary encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance MotorVelocityDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time velocity data from motor and secondary encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance MotorAccelerationDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time acceleration data from motor and secondary encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAccelerationData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance InputCurrentDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time input current data from motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance TorqueDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time torque data from motor and gearwheel"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time angular velocity data derived from motor position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance StructuralModelingSysML : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for friction model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for physical relationship understanding"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for joint friction identification using live operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for motion accuracy enhancement through friction model correction"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling of robot components using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelingInsight
]

instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models integrated with live operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction model correction"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlParametersAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for physical relationship understanding"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset management using Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetManagementInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data streaming via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into joint friction characteristics for control parameter adjustment"
]

instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting robot control parameters based on friction insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of physical system relationships for understanding"
]

instance AssetManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset management insights using AAS"
]

instance StructuralModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural modeling insights from SysML diagrams"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data streaming insights from MQTT protocol"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot including permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox, and associated components"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxis, MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor, MotorTorqueSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interactions, as the digital shadow operates with one-way data flow and does not transmit data back to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing for friction model identification and motion control adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot first axis components (motor, gearboxes), sensor data streamed via MQTT, SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), and unified dashboard for data visualization and processing."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, as the digital shadow is used during robot operation for continuous friction model improvement and motion accuracy enhancement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured data to identify friction loss and ensure model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) aligned with Industrie 4.0 standards and SysML for modeling."
]
